name: fablelayer
description: FableLayer injects transferable procedure and output-structure layers (verification grounding, completion evidence gate, systematic investigation, early-stop prevention, value output style) into Opus, Sonnet, and local LLMs. It is a discipline layer, not a capability transplant: model capability does not transfer through a harness, only procedure does. Ships a reproducible benchmark that measures the discipline and its limits. See bench/RESULTS.md for measured results; capability vs procedure boundary is documented in README.md.
layers_note: Layer directories are populated by the FableLayer build (modes: new, layer 1-4). promptcore=core/, procedure_harness=agents/ + hooks/, value_optimizer=styles/, skillpack_router=skills/. The plugin packages whichever layers exist at install time and does not synthesize missing layer content.
